strategyResults.details: pr.test.ts 25 tests pass; disk 12; cli 7. No regressions.

criteriaResults.evidence: All four signals (merge/approve/reject/edit) parsed in parseSignals + parseCommentSignal.
DEFAULT_POLL_MS=30000, MIN=10000 warning, rate-limit backoff cap 5min. Minor: warning says 'clamping' but doesn't clamp (does not affect default behavior).
checkAvailability covers version+auth+repo; fallback is DiskCheckpointMechanism (confirmed); three test cases verify all failure paths via spy.
getCheckpointMechanismFor in registry.ts resolves override → global → fallback. 5 tests confirm order.

PR title OK; new comment per checkpoint OK. BUT: (1) PR body renders a static placeholder, no '- [ ] <checkpointId>' checkbox items. (2) No mechanism for draft→ready transition when all checkpoints approved — GhClient lacks prReady, poll resolution never marks ready.
criteriaResults.feedback: Add (1) per-checkpoint checkbox list rendering: maintain a pendingCheckpoints set/map keyed by checkpointId. On each request() call, edit the PR body via a new GhClient.prEdit(prNumber, body) to include '- [ ] <id>' for each known checkpoint. When a checkpoint resolves as approved, update its line to '- [x] <id>'. (2) Draft→ready transition: add GhClient.prReady(prNumber) wrapping 'gh pr ready <number>'. After resolution if pending set is now empty, call prReady. Add tests: (a) body contains '- [ ]' / '- [x]' lines; (b) prReady is called when all pending checkpoints have resolved as approved; (c) prReady is NOT called if any checkpoint rejected.

criteriaResults.evidence: registerCheckpointMechanism('pr', ...) at module load in registry.ts.
25 tests cover all required branches. No real gh invocations (vi.fn stubs throughout).

generatorFeedback.description: PR body must contain '- [ ] <checkpointId>' markdown checkboxes; add GhClient.prEdit(prNumber, body) and update body on each new checkpoint. Update '[ ]' to '[x]' when checkpoint resolves as approved.

Add GhClient.prReady(prNumber) wrapping 'gh pr ready <number>'. Track pending checkpoints; when all have resolved as approved, call prReady to convert draft→ready. Add unit tests for these two behaviors.
Misleading warning: says 'clamping' but doesn't clamp. Either clamp via Math.max OR rewrite the warning to not promise clamping.

summary: 8/9 required criteria pass; s10-c6 fails: PR body has no checkbox list and no draft→ready transition logic when all checkpoints approved. All strategies (typecheck/lint/build/test) pass; no regressions.
